text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa and I have come to a shrine for a
change of pace.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hm, hm, hm. ♪

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Por supuesto! I'm here to take on a challenge
from the gods!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Fukukitaru told me if you can make it from the
torii gate to that tree with your eyes closed, your
dreams will come true!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So basically...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The gods have issued me this challenge, and I
shall face it head on!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'm positive!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Of course, I will be the one to fulfill my dream and become the world's strongest! I don't need the gods for that.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
But there's no way I'm gonna pass up a challenge!
I've got a reputation, y'know!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa puts a blindfold over her mask
and slowly starts walking...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh, I hit something... This feels like...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hurra! I made it to the tree!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Invincible, unbeatable—El's unstoppable!
Challenge conquered!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehe, it was nothing!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
However, this should make my dreams extra
certain to come true!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's sealed and stamped by the gods! No one can
stop me now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: El Condor Pasa seems like she's in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's get started...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thunk!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ouch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa bumps into a tree and removes
her blindfold so quickly her mask comes off with
it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoooshhh!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Agh! My mask!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To make matters worse, El Condor Pasa's mask is
blown away by the wind.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: M-my mask! Waaait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps this is punishment for treating a
challenge from the gods like a game...
